# NXT-55500 — DMF - View Log - Exceptions

## Description
As a Customer Support role user, I would like to be able to view the exceptions of the modules I am importing so that I can quickly diagnose the issue causing the error

*Notes:*

* After our first prototype review, it was discussed that we needed to be able to see what failed

*Requirements:*

* In the database:
* Store all exceptions generated by the DMF and specify:
** Which Migration 
** Which database/module it came from
** Which table failed
** Date/time
** The exact error so the user can no what to fix
** If possible, specify which row or record failed
** If possible, specify which feature this is for
* Create an API endpoint to provide this data per Migration



*View Log Overlay*

* For the View Log overlay, on each tab, do the following:
* If the row has Error as status:
** Show a View icon
** On hover over, show a modal popup
** Model Popup should have:
*** Title = Error Message
*** Icon
**** Tooltip: Copy to Clipboard
**** On click: copy the error message to the clipboard
*** Body = the exception message
*** X button to close the popup



*-View Log Overlay-*

* -Add a new tab at the end- 
** -Name: Exceptions-
* -Fields:-
** -Put a grid on it-
** -Data: list of exceptions for this migration-
** -Columns:-
*** -Module-
*** -Feature-
**** -Note: show this if possible, but may not be-
*** -Table-
*** -Record-
**** -Note: show if possible, but may not be-
*** -Error-

## Acceptance Criteria
* User is able to see the error that caused the migration failure
